Method.Name: main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement2019
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement2019() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT r.runtime_stats_id AS %1, r.plan_id AS %2, r.runtime_stats_interval_id AS %3, r.execution_type AS %4, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.execution_type_desc) AS %5, r.first_execution_time AS %6, r.last_execution_time AS %7, r.count_executions AS %8, r.avg_duration AS %9, r.last_duration AS %10, r.min_duration AS %11, r.max_duration AS %12, r.stdev_duration AS %13, r.avg_cpu_time AS %14, r.last_cpu_time AS %15, r.min_cpu_time AS %16, r.max_cpu_time AS %17, r.stdev_cpu_time AS %18, r.avg_logical_io_reads AS %19, r.last_logical_io_reads AS %20, r.min_logical_io_reads AS %21, r.max_logical_io_reads AS %22, r.stdev_logical_io_reads AS %23, r.avg_logical_io_writes AS %24, r.last_logical_io_writes AS %25, r.min_logical_io_writes AS %26, r.max_logical_io_writes AS %27, r.stdev_logical_io_writes AS %28, r.avg_physical_io_reads AS %29, r.last_physical_io_reads AS %30, r.min_physical_io_reads AS %31, r.max_physical_io_reads AS %32, r.stdev_physical_io_reads AS %33, r.avg_clr_time AS %34, r.last_clr_time AS %35, r.min_clr_time AS %36, r.max_clr_time AS %37, r.stdev_clr_time AS %38, r.avg_dop AS %39, r.last_dop AS %40, r.min_dop AS %41, r.max_dop AS %42, r.stdev_dop AS %43, r.avg_query_max_used_memory AS %44, r.last_query_max_used_memory AS %45, r.min_query_max_used_memory AS %46, r.max_query_max_used_memory AS %47, r.stdev_query_max_used_memory AS %48, r.avg_rowcount AS %49, r.last_rowcount AS %50, r.min_rowcount AS %51, r.max_rowcount AS %52, r.stdev_rowcount AS %53, r.avg_num_physical_io_reads AS %54, r.last_num_physical_io_reads AS %55, r.min_num_physical_io_reads AS %56, r.max_num_physical_io_reads AS %57, r.avg_log_bytes_used AS %58, r.last_log_bytes_used AS %59, r.min_log_bytes_used AS %60, r.max_log_bytes_used AS %61, r.stdev_log_bytes_used AS %62, r.avg_tempdb_space_used AS %63, r.last_tempdb_space_used AS %64, r.min_tempdb_space_used AS %65, r.max_tempdb_space_used AS %66, r.stdev_tempdb_space_used AS %67, r.avg_duration * r.count_executions AS %68, r.avg_cpu_time * r.count_executions AS %69, r.avg_logical_io_reads * r.count_executions AS %70, r.avg_logical_io_writes * r.count_executions AS %71, r.avg_physical_io_reads * r.count_executions AS %72, r.avg_clr_time * r.count_executions AS %73, r.avg_dop * r.count_executions AS %74, r.avg_query_max_used_memory * r.count_executions AS %75, r.avg_rowcount * r.count_executions AS %76, r.avg_num_physical_io_reads * r.count_executions AS %77, r.avg_log_bytes_used * r.count_executions AS %78, r.avg_tempdb_space_used * r.count_executions AS %79, 0 AS %80, 1010 AS %81 FROM sys.query_store_runtime_stats r", asRuntimeStatsId, asPlanId, asRuntimeStatsIntervalId, asExecutionType, asExecutionTypeDesc, asFirstExecutionTime, asLastExecutionTime, asCountExecutions, asAvgDuration, asLastDuration, asMinDuration, asMaxDuration, asStdevDuration, asAvgCpuTime, asLastCpuTime, asMinCpuTime, asMaxCpuTime, asStdevCpuTime, asAvgLogicalIoReads, asLastLogicalIoReads, asMinLogicalIoReads, asMaxLogicalIoReads, asStdevLogicalIoReads, asAvgLogicalIoWrites, asLastLogicalIoWrites, asMinLogicalIoWrites, asMaxLogicalIoWrites, asStdevLogicalIoWrites, asAvgPhysicalIoReads, asLastPhysicalIoReads, asMinPhysicalIoReads, asMaxPhysicalIoReads, asStdevPhysicalIoReads, asAvgClrTime, asLastClrTime, asMinClrTime, asMaxClrTime, asStdevClrTime, asAvgDop, asLastDop, asMinDop, asMaxDop, asStdevDop, asAvgQueryMaxUsedMemory, asLastQueryMaxUsedMemory, asMinQueryMaxUsedMemory, asMaxQueryMaxUsedMemory, asStdevQueryMaxUsedMemory, asAvgRowcount, asLastRowcount, asMinRowcount, asMaxRowcount, asStdevRowcount, asAvgNumPhysicalIoReads, asLastNumPhysicalIoReads, asMinNumPhysicalIoReads, asMaxNumPhysicalIoReads, asAvgLogBytesUsed, asLastLogBytesUsed, asMinLogBytesUsed, asMaxLogBytesUsed, asStdevLogBytesUsed, asAvgTempdbSpaceUsed, asLastTempdbSpaceUsed, asMinTempdbSpaceUsed, asMaxTempdbSpaceUsed, asStdevTempdbSpaceUsed, asTotalDuration, asTotalCpuTime, asTotalLogicalIoReads, asTotalLogicalIoWrites, asTotalPhysicalIoReads, asTotalClrTime, asTotalDop, asTotalQueryMaxUsedMemory, asTotalRowcount, asTotalNumPhysicalIoReads, asTotalLogBytesUsed, asTotalTempdbSpaceUsed, asReplicaGroupId, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: createSQLStatement2022
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement2022() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT r.runtime_stats_id AS %1, r.plan_id AS %2, r.runtime_stats_interval_id AS %3, r.execution_type AS %4, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.execution_type_desc) AS %5, r.first_execution_time AS %6, r.last_execution_time AS %7, r.count_executions AS %8, r.avg_duration AS %9, r.last_duration AS %10, r.min_duration AS %11, r.max_duration AS %12, r.stdev_duration AS %13, r.avg_cpu_time AS %14, r.last_cpu_time AS %15, r.min_cpu_time AS %16, r.max_cpu_time AS %17, r.stdev_cpu_time AS %18, r.avg_logical_io_reads AS %19, r.last_logical_io_reads AS %20, r.min_logical_io_reads AS %21, r.max_logical_io_reads AS %22, r.stdev_logical_io_reads AS %23, r.avg_logical_io_writes AS %24, r.last_logical_io_writes AS %25, r.min_logical_io_writes AS %26, r.max_logical_io_writes AS %27, r.stdev_logical_io_writes AS %28, r.avg_physical_io_reads AS %29, r.last_physical_io_reads AS %30, r.min_physical_io_reads AS %31, r.max_physical_io_reads AS %32, r.stdev_physical_io_reads AS %33, r.avg_clr_time AS %34, r.last_clr_time AS %35, r.min_clr_time AS %36, r.max_clr_time AS %37, r.stdev_clr_time AS %38, r.avg_dop AS %39, r.last_dop AS %40, r.min_dop AS %41, r.max_dop AS %42, r.stdev_dop AS %43, r.avg_query_max_used_memory AS %44, r.last_query_max_used_memory AS %45, r.min_query_max_used_memory AS %46, r.max_query_max_used_memory AS %47, r.stdev_query_max_used_memory AS %48, r.avg_rowcount AS %49, r.last_rowcount AS %50, r.min_rowcount AS %51, r.max_rowcount AS %52, r.stdev_rowcount AS %53, r.avg_num_physical_io_reads AS %54, r.last_num_physical_io_reads AS %55, r.min_num_physical_io_reads AS %56, r.max_num_physical_io_reads AS %57, r.avg_log_bytes_used AS %58, r.last_log_bytes_used AS %59, r.min_log_bytes_used AS %60, r.max_log_bytes_used AS %61, r.stdev_log_bytes_used AS %62, r.avg_tempdb_space_used AS %63, r.last_tempdb_space_used AS %64, r.min_tempdb_space_used AS %65, r.max_tempdb_space_used AS %66, r.stdev_tempdb_space_used AS %67, r.avg_duration * r.count_executions AS %68, r.avg_cpu_time * r.count_executions AS %69, r.avg_logical_io_reads * r.count_executions AS %70, r.avg_logical_io_writes * r.count_executions AS %71, r.avg_physical_io_reads * r.count_executions AS %72, r.avg_clr_time * r.count_executions AS %73, r.avg_dop * r.count_executions AS %74, r.avg_query_max_used_memory * r.count_executions AS %75, r.avg_rowcount * r.count_executions AS %76, r.avg_num_physical_io_reads * r.count_executions AS %77, r.avg_log_bytes_used * r.count_executions AS %78, r.avg_tempdb_space_used * r.count_executions AS %79, r.replica_group_id AS %80, 1010 AS %81 FROM sys.query_store_runtime_stats r", asRuntimeStatsId, asPlanId, asRuntimeStatsIntervalId, asExecutionType, asExecutionTypeDesc, asFirstExecutionTime, asLastExecutionTime, asCountExecutions, asAvgDuration, asLastDuration, asMinDuration, asMaxDuration, asStdevDuration, asAvgCpuTime, asLastCpuTime, asMinCpuTime, asMaxCpuTime, asStdevCpuTime, asAvgLogicalIoReads, asLastLogicalIoReads, asMinLogicalIoReads, asMaxLogicalIoReads, asStdevLogicalIoReads, asAvgLogicalIoWrites, asLastLogicalIoWrites, asMinLogicalIoWrites, asMaxLogicalIoWrites, asStdevLogicalIoWrites, asAvgPhysicalIoReads, asLastPhysicalIoReads, asMinPhysicalIoReads, asMaxPhysicalIoReads, asStdevPhysicalIoReads, asAvgClrTime, asLastClrTime, asMinClrTime, asMaxClrTime, asStdevClrTime, asAvgDop, asLastDop, asMinDop, asMaxDop, asStdevDop, asAvgQueryMaxUsedMemory, asLastQueryMaxUsedMemory, asMinQueryMaxUsedMemory, asMaxQueryMaxUsedMemory, asStdevQueryMaxUsedMemory, asAvgRowcount, asLastRowcount, asMinRowcount, asMaxRowcount, asStdevRowcount, asAvgNumPhysicalIoReads, asLastNumPhysicalIoReads, asMinNumPhysicalIoReads, asMaxNumPhysicalIoReads, asAvgLogBytesUsed, asLastLogBytesUsed, asMinLogBytesUsed, asMaxLogBytesUsed, asStdevLogBytesUsed, asAvgTempdbSpaceUsed, asLastTempdbSpaceUsed, asMinTempdbSpaceUsed, asMaxTempdbSpaceUsed, asStdevTempdbSpaceUsed, asTotalDuration, asTotalCpuTime, asTotalLogicalIoReads, asTotalLogicalIoWrites, asTotalPhysicalIoReads, asTotalClrTime, asTotalDop, asTotalQueryMaxUsedMemory, asTotalRowcount, asTotalNumPhysicalIoReads, asTotalLogBytesUsed, asTotalTempdbSpaceUsed, asReplicaGroupId, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: createSQLStatement
initialize
construct
